name: teamhub-create-task
description: Create a high-priority task via Team Hub MCP
prompt: Create a new task called 'Fix login page CSS alignment' with high priority.
system_prompt: You are a Team Hub assistant. Use the Team Hub MCP tools (create_item, list_items, search_items, etc.) to manage workspace tasks. Do NOT read local files — use the MCP tools.
success_criteria: Task created with correct title and priority
